name: Azure MRI Surescan Pacemaker Failure Modes
description: Azure MRI Surescan pacemaker failure modes may occur due to incompatibility with certain types of MRI scans or patients with specific medical conditions or implanted devices that are incompatible with MRI scans. These failures can compromise the safety and efficacy of the technology during MRI procedures, leading to potential harm to the patient. Understanding these failure modes is crucial for ensuring safe and effective use of the Azure MRI Surescan pacemaker system.
